html:
“Creates a Dwarf Star.”

-

The Star Caller's Staff is a craftable Item found in the Ancient Pseudoscience Filter. It requires 4 Nightmare Fuel, 2 Living Logs, 2 Yellow Gems, and a broken Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft. It also can randomly drop from an Ancient Pseudoscience Station when damaged with a Hammer or Gunpowder etc., and has a 33% chance to be found inside a Large Ornate Chest. Like all items from the Ancient Pseudoscience Filter, Star Caller's Staffs cannot be prototyped and can only be made near an Ancient Pseudoscience Station.

Haunting a Star Caller's Staff may cast the spell, and haunting a Dwarf Star will extinguish it. After A New Reign update, the staff can be transformed into the Moon Caller's Staff using a Moon Stone.

It can be used to completely replace Fire Pits so long as a supply of Yellow Gems is maintained and regular trips to the Ruins are carried out.

Usage

during Full Moon

Dwarf Star

When equipping the Star Caller's Staff in the hand slot, it can be used on any visible point on the ground to summon a Dwarf Star. It can also be randomly summoned by hitting an Ancient Pseudoscience Station with a hammer.

A single dwarf star will last 28 minutes (3.5 in-game days). With 20 uses, this means a single staff will yield a total of 70 days of dwarf stars. During that time it provides a fluctuating radius of light, heat equivalent to that of a 3rd tier Campfire fire (180 units; the 4th and highest tier is 220 units of heat) and a Sanity boost of 25 per minute while standing near it. The Dwarf Star can also be used to cook Food, similar to a Campfire. It can also burn flammable objects that are too close to it, so caution is advised as to where the staff is used. With each use of the Staff, Characters will lose 20 and the Staff will lose 5% of its Durability.

Dwarf Stars can be used to aid in the growth of Farm Plants by providing light during the Night and in Caves.


Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Radiant Star Caller's Staff skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from September 12, 2019 to October 24, 2019, and from January 21, 2021 to January 28, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Woven - Elegant Star Staff skin was introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's Terraria. Its rarity was Inspired - Elegant initially, but received change on August 19, 2022.
Woven - Elegant
An Eye for an Eye Collection
Star Staff
Call on the power of otherworldly stars.
Woven - Elegant
Reliquary Collection
Twisted Star Caller's Staff
Wrap yourself in the warm glow of the stars.
Loyal
Crystalline Collection
Radiant Star Caller's Staff
A blindingly beautiful staff, filled with the magic of stars.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Swamp Collection
Primal Star Caller's Staff
Old stars, lend your light!

Tips

  • It's a good idea to equip a Construction Amulet when crafting this Staff, to save one Yellow Gem.
  • The Star Caller's Staff can be used as an alternative to Campfires later in the game, for those who would rather not carry around Logs and Cut Grass.
  • While the Staff cannot be used in the dark, it can still be used a few seconds before complete darkness settles in. When this happens the light emitted from the casting process will keep the Character safe from Charlie.
  • As long as Characters stay close to the Dwarf Star, they can get a net bonus of 30, excluding outside factors, resulting in no Sanity cost from using the Staff.
    • Willow's Sanity regeneration perk works with the Dwarf Star too resulting in 50 recovered.
    • There is no limit to the amount of Dwarf Stars that players can summon at the same time and their Sanity boosts stack with each-other. This means that players can summon multiple Dwarf Stars at the same spot to boost their Character's Sanity quicker.
  • It is worth not using up the Star Caller's Staff completely, preserving it when its durability reaches 5%, since it can be transformed into a full-durability Moon Caller's Staff.

Trivia

  • The Star Caller's Staff was added in the Hungry For Your Hunger update. Its crafting requirement was changed during the Stuff of Nightmares update.

“A genius invention... a gem on a stick.”
–Wilson
“It's magical.”
–Willow
“Pretty gem sits in stick.”
–Wolfgang
“The stick is as twisted as my soul.”
–Wendy
“THESE GEMS WORK WELL WITH STICKS”
–WX-78
“Luckily the star is a manageable size.”
–Wickerbottom
“Useful in a pinch!”
–Woodie
“With a bigger gem it would be so much more powerful.”
–Maxwell
“It summöns the stars!”
–Wigfrid
“We summon you, warm ball of light!”
–Webber
“I could stir a huge pot with this thing!”
–Warly
“Zoom Stick”
–Wormwood
“I'm not fully grasping this whole "magic" thing.”
–Winona
“It calls the sun from out the sky!”
–Wortox
“Has pretty yellow rock on it.”
–Wurt
“It never hurts to have a little star power.”
–Walter
“Does no one else think summoning a small STAR might be dangerous?”
–Wanda
“Creates a Dwarf Star.”

{{Navbutton/Separation}} {{Object Infobox |equipslot=hands |icon = Star Caller's Staff.png |image = Star Caller's Staff Dropped.png |scrapbook_description =Creates a Dwarf Star. |tier = 5 |filter = {{Pic32|Ancient Pseudoscience Filter}} |ingredient1 = Nightmare Fuel |multiplier1 = 4 |ingredient2 = Living Log |multiplier2 = 2 |ingredient3 = Yellow Gem |multiplier3 = 2 |perk = Summon a Dwarf Star |stack = Does not stack |durability = 20 uses |spawnCode = "yellowstaff" |droppedBy = [[File:Ornate Chest.png|30px|link=Ornate Chest#Large Ornate Chest]][[File:Icon Ancient.png|24px|link=Ancient Pseudoscience Station]] |objectSanity= -20 per use |description = Summon a tiny star. |haunt = 10% chance to spawn a [[Star Caller's Staff/DST#Dwarf_Star|Dwarf Star]] nearby }} {{Quotes |wilson = A genius invention... a gem on a stick. |willow = It's magical. |wolfgang = Pretty gem sits in stick. |wendy = The stick is as twisted as my soul. |wx78 = THESE GEMS WORK WELL WITH STICKS |wickerbottom = Luckily the star is a manageable size. |woodie = Useful in a pinch! |maxwell = With a bigger gem it would be so much more powerful. |wigfrid = It summöns the stars! |webber = We summon you, warm ball of light! |winona = I'm not fully grasping this whole "magic" thing. |warly = I could stir a huge pot with this thing! |wortox = It calls the sun from out the sky! |wormwood = Zoom Stick |wurt = Has pretty yellow rock on it. |walter = It never hurts to have a little star power. |wanda = Does no one else think summoning a small STAR might be dangerous? |choose = wortox }} {{Scrapbook Info|Creates a Dwarf Star.}} The '''Star Caller's Staff''' is a craftable [[Item]] found in the [[Ancient Pseudoscience Filter]]. It requires 4 [[Nightmare Fuel]], 2 [[Living Log]]s, 2 [[Yellow Gem]]s, and a broken [[Ancient Pseudoscience Station]] to craft. It also can randomly drop from an Ancient Pseudoscience Station when damaged with a [[Hammer]] or [[Gunpowder]] etc., and has a 33% chance to be found inside a [[Large Ornate Chest]]. Like all items from the Ancient Pseudoscience Filter, Star Caller's Staffs cannot be prototyped and can only be made near an Ancient Pseudoscience Station. [[Haunt]]ing a Star Caller's Staff may cast the spell, and haunting a Dwarf Star will extinguish it. After ''[[A New Reign]]'' update, the staff can be transformed into the [[Moon Caller's Staff]] using a [[Moon Stone]]. It can be used to completely replace [[Fire Pit]]s so long as a supply of Yellow Gems is maintained and regular trips to the [[Ruins]] are carried out. === Usage === {{Recipe |item1 = Star Caller's Staff |tool = Moon Stone |result = Moon Caller's Staff |note = during [[Full Moon/DST|Full Moon]] }} {{Clear}} == Dwarf Star == {{Object Infobox |name = Dwarf Star |image = Dwarf Star.png |perk = Provides light and heat.
Can cook. |durability = 3.5 days |objectSanity= +25/min
+27.5/min ([[File:Willow Portrait.png|24px|link=Willow]]) |spawnCode = "stafflight" |spawnFrom = {{pic24|Star Caller's Staff}}, {{pic|24|Ancient Pseudoscience Station}} ({{pic24|Hammer}}) |haunt = Is extinguished }} {{Quotes |wilson = That seems really dangerous. |willow = It's so beautiful! |wolfgang = It hurts to touch. |wendy = I can almost make out a tiny solar system. |wx78 = SUCH POWER!! |wickerbottom = Perhaps a larger staff would summon a larger star. |woodie = Well, ain't that something. |maxwell = That should chase the shadows away. |wigfrid = Behöld! A gift fröm Wötan! |webber = Cozy. |winona = No time for star gazin'. |warly = Too much power to hold in one hand. |wortox = So bright it hurts my beady imp eyes! |wormwood = Bright!! Very bright! |wurt = Glorph! Burny light! |walter = Almost better than a campfire. |wanda = A tiny star, what could go wrong? |choose = wendy }} When equipping the Star Caller's Staff in the hand slot, it can be used on any visible point on the ground to summon a Dwarf Star. It can also be randomly summoned by hitting an [[Ancient Pseudoscience Station]] with a hammer. A single dwarf star will last 28 minutes (3.5 in-game days). With 20 uses, this means a single staff will yield a total of 70 days of dwarf stars. During that time it provides a fluctuating radius of light, heat equivalent to that of a 3rd tier [[Campfire]] fire (180 units; the 4th and highest tier is 220 units of heat) and a [[Sanity]] boost of 25 {{sanity}} per minute while standing near it. The Dwarf Star can also be used to [[Cooking|cook]] [[Food]], similar to a Campfire. It can also burn flammable objects that are too close to it, so caution is advised as to where the staff is used. With each use of the Staff, Characters will lose 20 {{sanity}} and the Staff will lose 5% of its [[Durability]]. Dwarf Stars can be used to aid in the growth of [[Farm Plant]]s by providing light during the [[Night]] and in [[Caves]]. __NOTOC__ {{Clear}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Staffs Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Loyal Radiant Star Caller's Staff''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from September 12, 2019 to October 24, 2019, and from January 21, 2021 to January 28, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points. * The '''Woven - Elegant Star Staff''' skin was introduced in the ''[[An Eye for An Eye]]'' update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's ''Terraria''. Its rarity was '''Inspired - Elegant''' initially, but received change on August 19, 2022.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * It's a good idea to equip a [[Construction Amulet]] when crafting this Staff, to save one [[Yellow Gem]]. * The Star Caller's Staff can be used as an alternative to Campfires later in the game, for those who would rather not carry around [[Logs]] and [[Cut Grass]]. * While the Staff cannot be used in the dark, it can still be used a few seconds before complete darkness settles in. When this happens the light emitted from the casting process will keep the Character safe from [[Charlie]]. * As long as Characters stay close to the Dwarf Star, they can get a net bonus of 30{{sanity}}, excluding outside factors, resulting in no Sanity cost from using the Staff. ** [[Willow]]'s Sanity regeneration perk works with the Dwarf Star too resulting in 50{{sanity}} recovered. ** There is no limit to the amount of Dwarf Stars that players can summon at the same time and their Sanity boosts stack with each-other. This means that players can summon multiple Dwarf Stars at the same spot to boost their Character's Sanity quicker. * It is worth not using up the Star Caller's Staff completely, preserving it when its durability reaches 5%, since it can be transformed into a full-durability [[Moon Caller's Staff]]. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Star Caller's Staff was added in the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History|Hungry For Your Hunger]]'' update.
